mapper.select: select user_id, tracking_day, status, record_number, job_id, notes, create_time, update_time from kh_tracking_generate_status where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and tracking_day = #{trackingDay,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

select user_id, tracking_day, status, record_number, job_id, notes, create_time, update_time from kh_tracking_generate_status where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and tracking_day in
#{item}
mapper.insert:
insert into kh_tracking_generate_status (user_id, tracking_day, status, record_number, job_id, notes) values
( #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.trackingDay,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{item.recordNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.notes,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
update kh_tracking_generate_status set
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
notes = #{notes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
record_number = #{recordNumber,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and tracking_day = #{trackingDay,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
